blocks.text: A quiet Saturday at the leaderboard — Woodland runs away in Houston while Reitan and Ventura finish deep in the field. Norwegian golf is on pause until the Masters.
🚴 Sun 11:00 — Gent-Wevelgem: Abrahamsen, Wærenskjold and Hoelgaard chase Spring Classic glory in Flanders
♟️ Wed 16:00 — Magnus Carlsen opens FIDE Candidates — the World Chess Championship race begins
